seoTitle: Lower Marshes vs Lower Snug — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lower Marshes and Lower Snug. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lower Marshes vs Lower Snug: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lower Marshes and Lower Snug.
heading: Lower Marshes vs Lower Snug — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Marshes, Tasmania and Lower Snug, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Snug has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Lower Marshes (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Marshes or Lower Snug safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Marshes has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Lower Snug scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Marshes scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Snug scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Marshes or Lower Snug?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Snug has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
